title: How To Tell If A Guy Likes You Instantly - Proven To Work (Matthew Hussey, Get The Guy)
text: Hi, I'm Matthew Hussey. In this video, I'm going to be talking to you about how to tell if a guy likes you. So, here are four things to look for. One is proximity. Now, what you want to look out for is is he finding reasons to kind of drift closer to you? If you're standing in a bar, do you find him kind of just coming closer and closer and closer? Every time you look back, he's a little closer. Men always do this with women they're attracted to. They just gravitate unconsciously. Secondly, when you're in conversation, does he offer up information that you didn't ask for? If he starts talking about his job or his car or his hobbies or where he went on holiday, if you didn't ask for that information, it's a sign that he's trying to impress you, and that's a good thing. Third, if you let the conversation die down, does he reinitiate? This is really important cuz a guy, if he's not interested, he'll generally just go back to his friends or he'll walk off or he'll leave the conversation there. What you want to look for is when you stop the conversation, does he start to reinitiate it and try and carry it on? And the fourth thing is touch. Is the guy looking for reasons to touch you? Any excuse, it doesn't matter how small or playful. It could be a playful tap on the arm, it could be a high five, it could be a thumb war. It doesn't matter. Is he looking for excuses to make a physical connection? Obviously, guys are always doing this with women that they're attracted to. So, I will see you soon, and for more information, visit gettheguy.co.uk.
